mapper.select: SELECT id, subject_type, subject_value, status, reason, expire_time, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM agent_governance_blacklist WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time = 0 OR expire_time > #{now})

SELECT id, subject_type, subject_value, status, reason, expire_time, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM agent_governance_blacklist WHERE subject_type = #{subjectType} AND subject_value = #{subjectValue} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time = 0 OR expire_time > #{now}) LIMIT 1
